## Performance Evaluation

This section reports performance metrics and evaluation figures generated from
the latest completed run of the selected experiment. The results are read
directly from experiment tracking artifacts to maintain consistency with the
recorded evaluation outputs.

```{python}
#| label: perf_eval_setup
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from PIL import Image

from thesis_mlflow_results import load_experiment_snapshot, format_key_metrics

EXPERIMENT_NAME = "btc_td3_tradingenv_reduced_features"
snapshot = load_experiment_snapshot(EXPERIMENT_NAME)
finished = snapshot.latest_finished
```

### Selected Metrics from the Latest Completed Run

```{python}
#| echo: false

if finished is None:
    print(f"No finished runs available for experiment: {EXPERIMENT_NAME}")
else:
    key_metrics_df = format_key_metrics(finished.get("evaluation_report"))
    if key_metrics_df.empty:
        print("No evaluation report artifact found for the latest completed run.")
    else:
        display(key_metrics_df)
```

### Evaluation Metadata Snapshot

```{python}
#| echo: false

if finished is not None:
    params = finished.get("params", {})
    latest = finished.get("latest_metrics")
    rows = [
        ("Run Name", finished.get("run_name")),
        ("Status", finished.get("status")),
        ("Start Time", str(finished.get("start_time"))),
        ("End Time", str(finished.get("end_time"))),
        ("Seed", params.get("seed")),
        ("Train Size", params.get("data_train_size")),
        ("Algorithm", params.get("training_algorithm")),
        ("Reward Type", params.get("env_reward_type")),
        ("Training Steps (latest metric)", None if latest is None else latest.get("training_steps")),
        ("Final Reward (latest metric)", None if latest is None else latest.get("final_reward")),
    ]
    meta_df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=["Field", "Value"])
    display(meta_df)
```

### Evaluation Plots

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

if finished is None:
    print("No finished run available to display evaluation plots.")
else:
    plots = finished.get("evaluation_plots", {})
    ordered = [
        ("Merged comparison", "merged_comparison"),
        ("Actual returns", "actual_returns"),
        ("Rewards", "rewards"),
        ("Positions", "positions"),
    ]

    for title, key in ordered:
        plot_path = plots.get(key)
        if plot_path and Path(plot_path).exists():
            img = Image.open(plot_path)
            fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
            ax.imshow(img)
            ax.axis("off")
            ax.set_title(title)
            plt.show()
        else:
            print(f"{title}: artifact not found")
```
